document_title: PR24 final determinations: Aligning risk and return

key_decisions.detail: Appointee WACC set at 4.03%, up from 3.72% at draft determination, reflecting updated market evidence
Point estimate of 5.10% based on CAPM framework with cross-checks
Maintained at 55%, consistent with draft determination and PR19
+£5bn sector-wide base cost allowance increase relative to draft determination
Introduced for outcomes with 300 basis point threshold before sharing triggers
New mechanism to allow in-period adjustments for performance commitment levels
New mechanism for developer services cost recovery
4% nominal dividend yield for financeability assessment
Financeability assessed at Baa1/BBB+ on notional structure

key_numbers.label: Appointee WACC (real, CPIH-stripped)
key_numbers.context: Final determination, up from 3.72% at draft

key_numbers.label: ASM threshold
key_numbers.context: Basis points of RoRE before aggregate sharing triggers

key_numbers.label: Sector base cost uplift
key_numbers.context: Increase from draft to final determination

glossary_terms.definition: Weighted Average Cost of Capital — the blended return on debt and equity, weighted by gearing
Capital Asset Pricing Model — framework for estimating cost of equity from risk-free rate, beta, and market risk premium
Return on Regulatory Equity — measure of shareholder returns relative to regulatory equity base
Total Market Return — the expected real return on the equity market portfolio
Market Risk Premium (or Equity Risk Premium) — the excess return of the market over the risk-free rate (TMR minus RFR)
Measure of systematic risk — the sensitivity of a company's equity returns to overall market returns
The assumed ratio of debt to total capital (debt + equity) used by Ofwat for the notional efficient company
Aggregate Sharing Mechanism — mechanism that shares extreme outperformance or underperformance on ODIs between company and customers
Outcome Adjustment Mechanism — allows in-period adjustments to performance commitment levels
Developer Delivered Cost Mechanism — mechanism for adjusting developer services cost allowances
Assessment of whether a notionally efficient company can maintain investment-grade credit metrics
Consumer Prices Index including owner-occupiers' housing costs — the inflation index used to strip real returns
Regulatory Capital Value — the regulated asset base on which companies earn a return
